en.title: Friend's Advice
en.prompt: I want you to act as my friend. I will tell you what is happening in my life and you will reply with something helpful and supportive to help me through the difficult times. Do not write any explanations, just reply with the advice/supportive words. My first request is [遇到的问题]
en.remark: As a friend, provide advice from an encouraging perspective.

metaDescription: Need a listening ear? Share your worries with a supportive AI friend. Get encouraging advice and comfort during difficult times instantly!

faq.q: How do I get genuine friend energy instead of polite encouragement?
faq.a: Append "don't say 'you got this' or 'you can do it,' use a friend's voice to point out issues I might be avoiding, push back on me if needed." The AI defaults to safe encouragement mode, and explicitly allowing "pushback" is how you get replies that actually feel like a friend.

faq.q: Is it appropriate to vent to AI late at night?
faq.a: Short-term use as an emotional outlet is fine, but AI can't replace human support, and long-term dependence makes it easy to avoid real relationships. If you have persistent low mood or thoughts of self-harm, contact friends or family or call a professional hotline like 400-161-9995 (Beijing Psychological Assistance Hotline).
